global_prompt: High-quality 3D animation in the style of Paw Patrol, vibrant colors, clean CGI, cinematic lighting, bright and cheerful atmosphere, smooth character animation, Nick Jr aesthetic, 4k render, detailed textures, expressive facial expressions
specific_prompts: A dynamic 3D action shot of Chase spinning rapidly in a circle, chasing his own tail. Yellow motion blur rings and speed lines surround him. The camera is steady while Chase is a blur of blue and brown fur in the center of the Lookout.

A dynamic 3D action shot of Chase spinning rapidly in a circle, chasing his own tail. Yellow motion blur rings and speed lines surround him. The camera is steady while Chase is a blur of blue and brown fur in the center of the Lookout. Chase is spinning fast, his face showing intense concentration and effort.
